title: Crypto data-source + data-QA provisioning (selection/QA only -- no fetch, no strategy, no backtest)
reconciliation_note: Both report.md (automation-written, active) and this report.json land on the conservative verdict DATA_NOT_READY_FETCH_AUTH_REQUIRED. An intermediate draft briefly proposed DATA_READY after the acquisition manifest confirmed a Binance SPOT lineage; that was corrected because the manifest documents 1h klines in a separate location (SPARTA_RESEARCH_LAB) and does NOT pin provenance for these exact 1d files. Crypto-D1 sec5 / Crypto-D2 sec6 require NAMED, PINNED provenance per dataset -- inference is not sufficient.

binding_context.crypto_d1_rules_applied: spot-first; BTC/ETH/SOL (XRP deferred); daily UTC 00:00 boundary; one quote currency documented; perps BLOCKED until funding sourced+frozen; NAMED/PINNED provenance per dataset (sec5); IS 2020-2023 / OOS 2024-2025 proposed, 2026 blocked; same validation ladder as futures.
binding_context.crypto_d2_rules_applied: spot OHLCV first; BTC/ETH/SOL; daily first; one consistent series per symbol, no cross-exchange stitching; SOL needs a justified per-symbol window (history starts mid-2020); BTC/ETH/SOL calendar alignment; 24/7 no expected weekend gaps; named pinned provenance per dataset (sec6).

2_local_search.method: Read-only Glob/Grep over the local repo. No network, no fetch.

candidate_dataset.location: data/frozen_regime_inputs/ (top-level repo data dir; NOT in trading_research/agentic_factory; gitignored)
candidate_dataset.quote_currency: USDT (consistent across all three; documented in filename only)
candidate_dataset.spot_or_perp: UNDETERMINED for these exact files -- filename 'usdt' and the manifest hint at spot, but nothing PINS it for these specific 1d CSVs.
candidate_dataset.source_exchange: UNPINNED for these exact files -- Binance-style USDT pair inferred; no provenance record in the daily files' own location.
candidate_dataset.lineage: Regime-intelligence drop-zone consumed by sparta_regime_intelligence.csv_loader; same data family as Crypto-D2 inventory item #3 (regime HMM mid-vol study, HISTORICAL_ONLY). Per Crypto-D1/D2 the STRATEGY results of that lane carry no edge; the raw QA'd OHLCV may be reused as DATA only if provenance is pinned and it is re-QA'd.
candidate_dataset.excluded: _SAMPLE_SYNTHETIC_btcusdt_1d.csv (synthetic placeholder -- never usable for an edge claim). Many *.csv.superseded.<timestamp> daily-refresh backups present (background automation).

acquisition_manifest_examined.instrument_path_prefix: https://data.binance.vision/data/spot/monthly/klines/{BTCUSDT,ETHUSDT,SOLUSDT}/1h/... -- the data/spot/ prefix indicates SPOT for THAT acquisition.
acquisition_manifest_examined.tls: curl/Schannel FULL chain verification ON; no --insecure / verify=False / cert bypass.
acquisition_manifest_examined.integrity: status ACQUIRED; total_files_good 279; total_checksum_mismatch 0; all three symbols present.
acquisition_manifest_examined.why_it_does_not_close_the_gap: Manifest interval is 1h and its raw_root is C:\SPARTA_RESEARCH_LAB\crypto_regime_momentum_meanrev\data\raw -- a SEPARATE timeframe and location from the 1d CSVs in SPARTA_BRAIN\data\frozen_regime_inputs being provisioned here. The manifest never references the daily files or a documented roll-up step. It is SUGGESTIVE of a Binance-spot lineage, NOT a pinned 1:1 provenance record for these exact daily files.

other_crypto_artifacts_found.content: Perp FUNDING-RATE arbitrage historical JSON for BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB/ARB/DOGE/etc.
other_crypto_artifacts_found.status: OUT OF SCOPE -- perp/funding data; perps are BLOCKED (Crypto-D1 sec4/sec9) until funding sourced+frozen. Not a spot OHLCV candidate.

3_data_qa.note: Read-only structural QA (stdlib only). No strategy, no backtest, no indicator/return computation beyond integrity checks.

is_oos_feasibility_crypto_d1_sec10.note: IS and OOS windows fully populated for all three symbols. SOL IS shorter (1238 vs 1461) because its history starts 2020-08-11 -- a justified per-symbol window, NOT fabricated/stitched pre-listing history. 2026 (149 days) is BLOCKED unless explicitly authorized.

3_data_qa.structural_qa_verdict: CLEAN -- 24/7 complete (every calendar day present), no duplicates, no invalid OHLC, no zero-volume bars, all three symbols calendar-aligned, one consistent series per symbol (no cross-exchange stitching), single consistent USDT quote. NOTE: a structural QA pass certifies STRUCTURE only -- it does NOT certify provenance or spot-vs-perp.

4_provisioning_decision.blocking_gap: PROVENANCE NOT PINNED for these exact daily files. Crypto-D1 sec5 / Crypto-D2 sec6 require a named exchange, a spot-vs-perp determination, and a documented retrieval method PER DATASET. The daily files' own location documents none; the only related manifest is 1h in a separate repo and does not pin these 1d files.
4_provisioning_decision.spot_vs_perp_is_a_hard_gate: UNDETERMINED for the provisioned files. If they were perp, the dataset is BLOCKED (perps need sourced+frozen funding). A frozen Crypto-D4 spec cannot be built on data whose instrument type is uncertified.
4_provisioning_decision.quote_currency: USDT consistent across all three (good), but the USDT-vs-USD-vs-USDC reconciliation rule is undocumented (known QA hazard, Crypto-D1 sec11 / Crypto-D2 sec6).
paths_to_readiness: (A) Pin provenance retroactively for the existing files: named exchange + EXPLICIT SPOT confirmation + retrieval method/date + quote rule (e.g., formally tie the daily series to the verified Binance-spot manifest and document the roll-up). No fetch. If done with confidence, data becomes ready.
(B) Crypto-D3b: a separately authorized, provenance-documented spot OHLCV re-provision for BTC/ETH/SOL. This IS a fetch and needs its own explicit authorization; this memo fetches nothing.

5_verdict_nuance: NOT a 'no data' situation and NOT a QA failure. Clean BTC/ETH/SOL daily USDT candles exist locally and PASS every structural QA check with feasible IS/OOS windows. They are NOT READY only because provenance is unpinned for these exact files -- spot-vs-perp is undetermined (a hard gate, since perps are blocked) and no source exchange / retrieval method is documented in the daily files' own location. A Binance-SPOT acquisition manifest exists and strongly SUGGESTS spot lineage, but it is 1h klines in a separate location and does not pin these 1d files. Readiness requires either (A) pinning provenance incl. explicit SPOT confirmation, or (B) a separately authorized provenance-documented re-provision (Crypto-D3b). Crypto-D4 (spec) must NOT start until the provenance gap closes.

6_tests.scoped_command: python -m pytest tests -q --rootdir=. --confcutdir=. -p no:cacheprovider (run from trading_research/agentic_factory)
6_tests.note: No engine/test/spec/data files were created or modified by Crypto-D3 -- only the report pair. Full-repo pytest remains blocked by the unrelated corrupt-named hydra directory at the repo root (collection-time WinError 2) -- pre-existing, NOT touched, NOT fixed. The pre-existing test_config_wiring session_start 09:30/14:30 flap (background automation) is unrelated and not touched.

7_next_step.recommended: Close the provenance gap via path (A) pin provenance for the existing data/frozen_regime_inputs BTC/ETH/SOL USDT daily CSVs (named exchange + SPOT confirmation + retrieval method + quote rule), OR path (B) authorize Crypto-D3b (a documented spot OHLCV re-provision). Only then author Crypto-D4 with 2026 sealed and SOL on a justified per-symbol window.
7_next_step.crypto_d3b_not_authorized: Any fetch is a separate, separately-authorized step. This memo fetches nothing.

trading_recommendation: NONE. Data-source + QA provisioning only. Local BTC/ETH/SOL daily USDT candles (data/frozen_regime_inputs) are structurally CLEAN with feasible IS/OOS windows, but provenance is UNPINNED for these exact files (spot-vs-perp undetermined; a Binance-spot manifest exists but is 1h in a separate location and does not pin these 1d files), so verdict is DATA_NOT_READY_FETCH_AUTH_REQUIRED. No crypto strategy is validated, paper-ready, or live-ready. Perps remain BLOCKED. Crypto remains a separate research lane; S30 and the futures branches (Donchian, S26-S29) remain PARKED and untouched. Nothing fetched, staged, or committed.
